description_long: This is a large, industrial-grade intermediate bulk container (IBC) tank, featuring a white, semi-translucent plastic body encased in a robust metal cage for structural support and protection. The tank sits atop a wooden pallet base, which is stained and shows signs of use, allowing for easy transport with forklifts or pallet jacks. The top of the tank has a prominent black screw cap for filling or accessing the contents, while one side features a circular outlet or valve at the bottom for dispensing liquids. The metal cage is constructed from square-section bars, providing rigidity and impact resistance, and the plastic tank inside is slightly stained, indicating prior use or exposure to the elements. The overall appearance is utilitarian and functional, typical of containers used for storing and transporting bulk liquids or chemicals in urban or industrial environments.
description: A large white plastic IBC tank encased in a metal cage, mounted on a wooden pallet with a black top cap and a bottom outlet valve.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal cage, white tank, and the wooden pallet base with some dirt and wear.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the uniform metal cage structure and the slightly stained plastic tank, with the pallet base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the bottom outlet valve centered in the cage, as well as the black top cap and pallet base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the metal cage and pallet base, with no visible outlet valve.
